title: calluna vulgaris f. serotina
intro: Calluna vulgaris f. serotina, commonly known as heather, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Calluna vulgaris f. serotina include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Calluna vulgaris f. serotina can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
